testcase.classname: useQrToken should initialize with a token and 60s timer when anonymousId is present
testcase.name: useQrToken should initialize with a token and 60s timer when anonymousId is present

testcase.classname: useQrToken should not initialize if anonymousId is null
testcase.name: useQrToken should not initialize if anonymousId is null

testcase.classname: useQrToken should decrement timer every second
testcase.name: useQrToken should decrement timer every second

testcase.classname: useQrToken should rotate token and reset timer when it reaches 0
testcase.name: useQrToken should rotate token and reset timer when it reaches 0
